title: vulpia incrassata var. letourneuxii
intro: Vulpia incrassata var. letourneuxii, also known as Vulpia letourneuxii, is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Vulpia letourneuxii has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues, and can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its health benefits.
